summary: First test session for LuxeVoyage. Full backend pytest suite (18 tests) and frontend playwright e2e all passed. Backend covers destinations, packages, auth (signup/login/me, duplicate, wrong pw), bookings (price calc verified 1890x2 -15% = $3213), wishlist (add/list/delete), contact, newsletter, stats, and AI trip planner (real Claude call, 3-day Bali plan returned valid JSON). Frontend covers home (hero+search widget), theme toggle (light/dark switches html.dark class), navbar (6 links navigate correctly), destinations grid (8 cards), packages filter (Honeymoon), package detail navigation, Book Now -> 3-step booking with confirmation ref LV-*, signup flow lands on /dashboard with lv_token stored, contact form toast, newsletter footer toast, and AI Planner returns full itinerary in ~30s.

issues: Animated counters render with a leading em-dash that visually reads like a minus sign (e.g. '—4,368+', '—23', '—3 yrs'). Consider removing the leading dash or using a different prefix style.

action_items: (Optional polish) Remove leading em-dash on Home hero animated stat counters or use a non-minus-looking separator.
critical_code_review_comments: Booking endpoint POST /api/bookings uses get_optional_user, so an unauthenticated visitor can book (user_id=null). This is intentional per design but means GET /bookings/me won't include guest bookings. Acceptable for MVP.
AI endpoint parses LLM JSON with json.loads after stripping fences. If model returns malformed JSON it returns 500. Acceptable - prompt enforces strict JSON and tested successfully.
JWT_SECRET in .env is a hardcoded placeholder string — fine for preview but should be rotated for production deployment.
Payment step is mocked as advertised; no card validation in backend - documented and expected.
test_credentials: Dynamic per-run signup: qatest+<timestamp>@luxe.com / TestPass123! (no preseeded admin)
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 9 destinations + 6 packages on startup (idempotent). Tests create transient users/bookings/contacts/newsletter entries prefixed with qatest+.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest is at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — uses xdist (2 workers) so the auth fixture has a signup-then-login fallback for race conditions. AI test allows 90s timeout. All data-testids in use: hero-section, hero-search-widget, theme-toggle, destinations-page, pkgcat-honeymoon, book-now-btn, ai-destination, ai-days, ai-budget, ai-travel-type, ai-hotel, ai-generate-btn, ai-result, auth-name, auth-email, auth-password, auth-submit, booking-page, b-name, b-email, b-phone, b-date, b-guests, b-requests, b-cardname, b-cardnumber, b-expiry, b-cvc, b-coupon, step-next, step-back, booking-confirmed, download-invoice, go-to-dashboard. Token localStorage key is 'lv_token'.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs identified; only one minor cosmetic design observation about leading em-dash on hero stat counters.
